title: Analytics - Fit Test Competed
scenario: Fit Test completion analytics event count increases in Firebase after successful test on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Locate and tap on Fit Test option (under Audio Settings or similar)
Follow on-screen instructions to complete the Fit Test successfully
Wait a few hours for Firebase event propagation
Open Firebase console for the app project
Verify the Fit Test completion event appears in the event list
Check default event elements: event graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment
Verify device PID is included in event parameters
Compare event count before and after the Fit Test to confirm increment
expected: Firebase Analytics page opens properly with default elements (event graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) and device PID. After completing the Fit Test on the mobile app, the event count for the Fit Test completion event increases after a few hours.
